/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/flux-editor.dir/flux-editor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/flux-editor.dir/main.cpp.o" -o flux-editor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jnd/Qt/6.10.1/gcc_64/lib /home/jnd/Qt/6.10.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.1 /home/jnd/Qt/6.10.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/jnd/Qt/6.10.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.1 -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/jnd/Qt/6.10.1/gcc_64/lib
